/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/RigelEngine.dir/game_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RigelEngine.dir/main.cpp.o -o RigelEngine  librigel_core.a /boot/system/develop/lib/libSDL2main.a /boot/system/develop/lib/libSDL2_mixer.so ../3rd_party/entityx/libentityx.a ../3rd_party/imgui-filebrowser/libimgui-filebrowser.a ../3rd_party/imgui/libdear_imgui.a /boot/system/develop/lib/libSDL2.so ../3rd_party/glad/libglad.a ../3rd_party/loguru/libloguru.a ../3rd_party/dbopl/libdbopl.a ../3rd_party/nuked-opl3/libnuked-opl3.a ../3rd_party/speex_resampler/libspeex_resampler.a ../3rd_party/stb/libstb.a
